---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}

# Resume

A concise overview of my bioinformatics, computational biology, and clinical genomics experience.

[📄 Download Networking Resume](Marina_Rice_Networking_Resume.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

<!-- Add this back after the professional resume exists:
[Download Professional Resume](professional-resume.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
-->

:::

## Networking Resume

<iframe
  src="Marina_Rice_Networking_Resume.pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="1000"
  style="border: 1px solid #d9e2e5; border-radius: 12px;">
</iframe>
